title: Trapping Rain Water
description:
Given `n` non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width
of each bar is `1`, compute how much water it can trap after raining.

solutions.summary: Water above a bar is set by the smaller of the tallest walls on each side.

steps.title: Track running wall heights from both ends
steps.explanation: Move the side with the smaller running max inward, because that side limits the water level.
